title: Automotive Defect Detection
problem: A 2-3% defect rate in precision components was leading to high customer returns. Manual inspection was missing 15-20% of defects due to human fatigue and the microscopic nature of the flaws.
solution: We deployed a custom computer vision system using YOLOv8, trained on over 50,000 production images. The system runs on NVIDIA Jetson edge devices, performing real-time inference in under 200ms per part.
unique_approach: Validated against real production data over 90 days before full deployment, ensuring zero-downtime integration.

title: Agriculture Crop Health Monitoring
problem: Across 5,000 acres, annual crop loss was averaging 8-15%. Issues like pest infestations and nutrient deficiencies were often detected 1-2 weeks too late for effective intervention.
solution: An integrated monitoring system combining satellite imagery (Sentinel-2), drone flyovers, and ground-based ML models for early disease detection and yield prediction.
unique_approach: Human-in-the-loop design: farmers can override AI suggestions, which then retrains the local model.

title: Logistics Smart Sorting
problem: Processing 50,000 parcels daily was taking 3-4 hours of manual sorting, leading to errors and a high cost-per-parcel of $1.50. Manual route planning was also inefficient.
solution: A dual-stage system: CV-based high-speed package sorting with 99.2% accuracy combined with a custom route optimization algorithm for last-mile delivery.
unique_approach: Optimized for real-world constraints including local traffic patterns, delivery windows, and driver fatigue metrics.

title: Retail Occupancy Intelligence
problem: Managing 1.2M sq ft with limited visibility into foot traffic patterns led to peak-hour bottlenecks and suboptimal lease pricing for high-traffic zones.
solution: Edge-based AI camera network providing real-time occupancy data, heatmaps, and dwell-time analysis without storing personal biometric data.
unique_approach: Privacy-first, GDPR-compliant architecture designed to improve customer experience without surveillance concerns.

title: Autonomous Drone Fleet Management
problem: Inefficient manual tracking of drone deliveries leading to delays and lost packages in complex urban environments.
solution: Developed a centralized fleet management dashboard with real-time telemetry, automated route optimization, and fail-safe protocols.
unique_approach: Implemented a custom mesh networking protocol for drone-to-drone communication in low-connectivity areas.

title: Smart Grid Energy Optimization
problem: Fluctuating renewable energy sources were causing grid instability and significant energy waste during peak production hours.
solution: Implemented a reinforcement learning agent to balance load and storage in real-time across the regional grid.
unique_approach: Simulated millions of grid scenarios using historical weather data to train the agent before deployment.

title: Financial Fraud Detection Engine
problem: Legacy rule-based fraud detection systems were missing sophisticated modern attack patterns, resulting in millions in annual losses.
solution: A real-time transaction scoring engine using ensemble machine learning models and graph neural networks to detect organized fraud rings.
unique_approach: Integrated graph neural networks to detect money laundering networks by analyzing relationship clusters.

title: Supply Chain Digital Twin
problem: Lack of visibility into supply chain bottlenecks and inability to test 'what-if' scenarios led to high inventory carrying costs.
solution: Created a full-scale digital twin of the global logistics network to simulate disruptions and optimize container routing in real-time.
unique_approach: Interactive 3D web dashboard for executive decision making, allowing for real-time disruption simulation.
